videos.title: Passo dello Stelvio from Bormio (Lombardy, Italy)
videos.description:
Climbing the mighty Passo dello Stelvio from Bormio (Lombardy, Italy)
- cycling the last 11.5 km (after the tunnels)

Bike: Colnago AC-R 2014 (hired at http://www.bormioskibike.com/).
Camera: Samsung Galaxy S2
Software: Microsoft Windows Movie Maker 2012
Many thanks to the photographer - my father Finn Hval :)
2014(c)www.MacWhale.eu
